=== PROJECT MANIFEST (Digested) ===
PROJECT NAME: Next.js Application
CLIENT & CONTEXT: Web application bootstrapped using Next.js.
TECHNICAL STACK: Next.js, TypeScript, Node/JS.
MAIN GOAL: Develop, run, and deploy a Next.js project.
KEY CODING RULES: Development server runs via `npm run dev` (or equivalent).
CONTENT EDITING: Modify content in `app/page.tsx`.
OPTIMIZATION: Uses `next/font` for font optimization (Geist).
DEPLOYMENT: Recommended deployment target is Vercel.
====================================
